{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "CLS-IX-RS",
      "title": "Reading Comprehension through Unseen Passage",
      "description": "Assessment of conceptual understanding, decoding, analyzing, inferring, interpreting and vocabulary skills through discursive and case-based factual passages.",
      "competencies": [
        "Comprehension",
        "Interpretation",
        "Analysis",
        "Inference",
        "Evaluation",
        "Vocabulary"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Reading Skills",
      "chapter_name": "Reading Comprehension through Unseen Passage"
    },
    {
      "code": "CLS-IX-GW",
      "title": "Writing Skills and Grammar",
      "description": "Assessment of creative expression, reasoning, justifying, illustrating, appropriate style and tone, using appropriate format and fluency, alongside applying conventions with accuracy.",
      "competencies": [
        "Creative expression of an opinion",
        "Reasoning",
        "Justifying",
        "Illustrating",
        "Appropriate style and tone",
        "Using appropriate format",
        "Fluency",
        "Applying conventions",
        "Accuracy"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Writing Skills and Grammar",
      "chapter_name": "Grammar and Writing Skills"
    },
    {
      "code": "CLS-IX-LTL",
      "title": "Language through Literature",
      "description": "Assessment of recalling, reasoning, appreciating, applying literary conventions, illustrating and justifying. Extracting relevant information, identifying central themes, understanding the writer's message and writing fluently.",
      "competencies": [
        "Recalling",
        "Reasoning",
        "Appreciating",
        "Applying literary conventions",
        "Illustrating",
        "Justifying",
        "Extract relevant information",
        "Identifying central theme and sub-theme",
        "Understanding the writer's message",
        "Writing fluently"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Language through Literature",
      "chapter_name": "Reference to the Context & Short & Long Answer Questions"
    },
    {
      "code": "CLS-IX-ALS",
      "title": "Listening and Speaking Skills (Internal Assessment)",
      "description": "Integrated component of language skills focusing on interactive competence, fluency, pronunciation, and grammatical accuracy in speaking and listening contexts.",
      "competencies": [
        "Interactive competence (Initiation & turn taking)",
        "Relevance to the topic",
        "Fluency (cohesion, coherence and speed)",
        "Pronunciation",
        "Language (grammar and vocabulary)"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Internal Assessment",
      "chapter_name": "Listening and Speaking Skills"
